candidates.why: Component of operating revenues but not the main consolidated top-line; include as lower priority revenue source.
Finance income, not core operating revenue, but can serve as a fallback revenue source if operating revenues are missing for some periods.
This is the consolidated top-line operating revenue, best representation of total revenue/sales.
Another label for interest income; not primary operating revenue but can serve as a tertiary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue; should NOT be used for REVT despite being in the candidate list.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue; should NOT be used for REVT.
Same as above, a total income measure, not revenue; should NOT be used for REVT.
A liability, not a revenue flow; should not be mapped to REVT.

variables.notes: Mapped REVT to the main top-line 'Operating revenues' with 'Rental revenue' and 'Interest revenue' as lower-priority fallbacks to capture possible label changes over time. Excluded income and liability totals that are not revenue measures.

candidates.why: Appears to be a total of operating expenses including overhead; likely mixes COGS and SG&A, so not ideal if more specific direct cost components exist.
Generic overhead-type operating expense; more SG&A-like than direct production cost.
Overhead-related (consulting, travel), usually SG&A rather than COGS.
Broad operating overhead; typically SG&A rather than direct COGS.
Staff costs that may be both direct and indirect; usually treated as SG&A if not specifically tied to production.
Clearly SG&A, not COGS.
Direct costs related to voyages for a shipping-type business; best proxy for COGS (direct operating costs).
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense line; should not be used for COGS.

variables.notes: Used 'Voyage Related Expenses' as the best representation of direct operating costs/COGS in a shipping context. Other listed items are operating overhead and better suited for SG&A.

candidates.why: Aggregate operating expense total; avoid for XSGA when more detailed SG&A components are available.
Operating overhead bucket, fits SG&A definition.
Another overhead bucket; strong SG&A component.
Classic SG&A line item (administrative expenses).

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Selected multiple SG&A-type components: Other Operating Expense, Travel and consultancy Expenses, Other operating expenses, Employee benefits expense, and General administrative expense. Excluded the total 'Operating expenses' per instruction to prefer detailed components and avoid totals for XSGA. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Travel and consultancy Expenses, [Income Statement] Employee benefits expense
No research & development-related line item appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, and no candidates were suggested. Treat XRD as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Represents interest income, not expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Explicit interest expense line; primary choice for XINT.
Represents profit attribution, not interest; not appropriate for XINT.
Represents profit attribution to shareholders, not interest expense.
Balance sheet item (accrued interest asset), not an expense flow; not suitable for XINT.
Debt principal, not expense; not XINT.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Liability for interest incurred but not paid; still not the P&L expense line we want.
Debt principal, not expense.
Equity attribution, not interest.
Equity attribution, not interest.

variables.notes: Mapped XINT to the explicit 'Interest Expense' line. Other listed items are interest income, balance sheet accounts, or equity attributions and are not appropriate for interest expense.

candidates.why: Component of equity but excludes share capital and retained earnings; not total book equity.
OCI-type reserve; only part of equity, not total BE.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; best available proxy for book equity since no explicit parent-only equity line is provided.

candidates.row_label: Other components of equity - Balancing value
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not a substantive equity measure.
Balancing artifact, not a core reported total.
Balancing artifact duplicating total equity; avoid for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Used 'Total Equity' as book equity. No separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' line is available; non-controlling interests are presented separately and appear zero, so Total Equity is the best proxy.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to non-controlling interests; not the balance sheet amount but confirms existence of minority interest concept.
Attribution to shareholders of parent, not minorities.
Interest-related asset, unrelated to minority interest.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; good secondary choice if primary line is missing in some periods.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet equity lines for non-controlling interests: 'Non-controlling Interests' as primary and 'Minority Interest' as fallback to handle possible label changes.
